headline: Senator Filibuster McBlab Reads Entire Phone Book Backwards To Delay Snack Vote
summary: Colleagues now know that 'Zzyzx, Zylus' is the last entry and that they're very hungry.
fullBody: Senator Filibuster McBlab read the entire phone book backwards to delay a vote on mandatory afternoon snacks. 'Zzyzx, Zylus,' McBlab began. 'Zzyzx, Zykar.' Colleagues dozed off around 'Wilson, Wendy.' The vote was ultimately postponed. 'I just wanted a cracker,' one senator whispered. McBlab considers it 'a victory for reverse alphabetization.' He's now preparing to read the dictionary backwards 'for symmetry.'
